name: Radisson Blu Plaza Bangkok
detail: I travel to Bangkok a lot and have stayed in many Bangkok hotels. Especially after a long haul flight, arriving here is the perfect refreshment. Drinks from the bar are reasonably priced and access to the sauna, steam room and gym are free. The wifi works perfectly in all areas of the hotel making it easy to catch up on work. The Radisson Blu Plaza has become my favourite hotel in Bangkok by a long shot. I would (and have) paid more than triple to stay in a hotel of equal quality. My one criticism of The Radisson Blu Plaza is that there are no bottles of water available in the sauna and steam room. Water is available freely in the gym and rooms, so you can still bring your own.

name: Solaria Nishitetsu Hotel Bangkok
detail: Overall, the service standards here are truly outstanding.

name: Palette The Travellers Hotel Bangkok
detail: It was great experience to stay with the property.

name: Montraj Coach Sukhumvit
detail: There was no funky smell like other hotels in Bangkok.

name: Pullman Bangkok Hotel G
detail: I am a visitor from Hong Kong and stay at Pullman Hotel G. Yesterday was my first day to check in to the hotel, Unfortunately I found my luggage was wrongly pick up at the airport. I was feeling lost and don't know what to do at that moment cause me and my girl friend doesn't speak Thai-language, also I don't even have a contact of my airline. So I went back to the lobby and looking for HELP. One of your staff which stay at Bell Captain side call Ping heard my situation and started help me to found out the number of the airline and talk with them about my issue. After all the conversation done, Ping suggest me to take the wrong luggage back to airport first and let BFS to handle my case. While we sent back the luggage and go to travel around, it was mid-night when we back to hotel. Another Bell Captain JoJo was there and I was asked for help to tracking my case. It was 8 hours later since I sent back the luggage and seems no luck on it as JoJo mention after he help to call the BFS. JoJo said he will stay connect with the BFS and let me know any update if need. Finally, BFS call me one hour later and said mine luggage was back to the airport and will sent back to the hotel I live! The next day I go back to Bell Captain, NJ saw my letter which provide by the hotel and already know what am I think of. My luggage is back! It's really amazing on all of you guys which help me on this ultimate-scared case and I think the training and the empathy of your staff are very well. I will recommend all my friend who will be BangKoK to travel to come to Pullman Bangkok Hotel G ! Also, a concierge staff call OFF also help us to contact the Van we book cause the time on my booking time is complicated. Thanks for his help too. Finally, i was received a cheat call from bangkok, thanks for your staff GAM to help me translate and let them know we are not worth to cheat. Again, thank you so much for all of your staff which helps.

name: Akara Hotel Bangkok
detail: We stayed in this hotel for 4 nights while in Bangkok. The rooms are absolutely BEAUTIFUL, marble everything, great shower, nice tub for baths, free bath bombs, great feeling sheets. You definitely feel like your staying in luxury, but for such a reasonable price! The staff is very attentive and will rush to open the door for you when they see you coming back, carry all your suitcases for you, etc. For the price I don’t think you will be able to find another hotel in Bangkok that offers this much. The breakfast buffet was amazing, they had a western side and Asian side. In the afternoons they serve snacks available to the guests for free from 2pm-5pm which was nice. I would absolutely stay in this hotel again if I come back to Bangkok!

name: T2 The Portal Sukhumvit
detail: Rose was awesome especiallt during my check in pricess.

name: ibis Styles Bangkok Silom
detail: The bed was comfortably firm and the linen squeaky clean.

name: The Residence on Thonglor by UHG
detail: We loved our four night stay at The Residence and would strongly recommend to anyone looking for a comfortable, upscale stay in a nice quiet neighbourhood. The rooms were spacious and spotless with great facilities and a comfortable bed, and the kitchenette and washing machine came in very handy (only bummer was there was never enough hot water to have a bath, so we didn't get to use the gorgeous tub). Decent selection of English cable TV channels too. The rooftop pool area is awesome, and we spent most mornings after breakfast up there swimming and lying by the pool reading before heading out for the day. There is a great sauna and onsen but unfortunately it's only available for the men, so my boyfriend was loving it while i was pretty disappointed. There is also a water cooler in the gym area which helps if you're like us and want to limit your use of buying plastic water bottles. The breakfast is served in a hip cafe where you get high Western standard cafe meals like eggs benedict, french toast, lattes, etc, plus small buffet of extras, which was a highlight and one of the best breakfasts i've had a a hotel in Thailand. The location is about 20-30 mins walk from the BTS station, but it's a very pleasant walk with no touts, just a nice stroll through one of bangkoks more upscale neighbourhoods with plenty of massage, restaurant and street food options. Tuk tuk will take you from the hotel to the station, and coming back you can just jump on one of the motorcycle taxis which is a lot of fun and will only cost you 20 THB to the hotel door. Overall, this was our favourite hotel in Thailand during this trip over the Christmas period and we would definitely return, and highly recommend it.

name: Grand Mercure Bangkok Atrium
detail: My wife and I stayed at the Amari Atrium Bangkok Hotel for 4 days. After being disappointed with a hotel we booked in Malaysia we were afraid that we might face the same sort of experience. But it was clear from the moment we got off the taxi that our stay at the Amari Atrium would be a pleasant one. As expected, it was. From the bell hop attending to your luggage, to a swift check in, for the people at the elevators helping us to find the right floor, we have not had a single day of bad experience. Even the service staff helped us understand the different between 'Sawadee krup' and 'Sawadee ka'! Can't be any more happier with our stay. Definitely a 5 star service!
